title: Utami's Bed
description: A tiny vanilla-friendly pack that gives the bed a clean and soft 3D look without changing the game’s visual style.
body:
![banner-bed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/futonid/resources/66aa87b6d170e107986ad9dbedd5583d91cae4cd/banner-bed.png)

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-utamis%20bed-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=modrinth&labelColor=f16436&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/utamis-bed)      [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-notes-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=github&labelColor=blue&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://github.com/futonid/mc-custom-uv-break-overlay)       [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-utamis%20bed-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=modrinth&labelColor=1bd96a&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/utamis-bed)       [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-support-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=buymeacoffee&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&label=quality&color=b5ffe5&cacheSeconds=3600) ](https://buymeacoffee.com/utamiid)

A minimal vanilla-style resource pack that replaces the default bed with a clean, soft 3D model. It blends naturally with Minecraft’s original textures, adds depth without breaking the art style, and keeps the file size extremely small. > I hope it will be useful to you. \- Utami ___
